_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=93 (set at 93.74 after gmail URL/method/serviceId pin + base64url + → - + Buffer.from utf8, buffer 0.74). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
